News & Updates

Stay informed about our latest activities and achievements.

Mar 14, 2025
News

182 Youth Graduate from BEYEPP

A momentous occasion as 182 young men and women graduate from the Building Ethiopian Youth Employment Program.

Campaign

Fundraising for Water Well Drilling

Join our campaign to bring clean water to the community surrounding Selam Children's Village.

Events

World Children's Day 2024

Invest in Children, Harvest a Generation

Your support transforms lives. Join us in nurturing hope and building futures for vulnerable children in Ethiopia.

Donate NowVolunteer

Established in 1986 by Mrs. Tsehay Roschli, Selam Children's Village provides comprehensive care, education, and vocational training to orphaned and vulnerable children in Ethiopia.
